features.summary: Added deterministic GET /api/answer endpoint with grounded draft and not_found responses.
Fixed server integration test lifecycle so the full test suite completes cleanly.
Added normalized ingestion for Markdown and TXT, preserved PDF via adapter, and documented DOCX dependency requirement.
Replaced DOCX ingestion stub with mammoth-based plain-text extraction into normalized sections.
Implemented provider-agnostic embedding chunk planning, deterministic identity, repository boundary, idempotent indexing, vector validation, failure handling, and provenance preservation.
Implemented deterministic hybrid retrieval ranking across phrase, keyword, and vector candidates while preserving evidence-first answer behavior.
Integrated hybrid retrieval into evidence and API flows while preserving keyword, phrase, and deterministic answer behavior.
Added pgvector schema, production repository adapter, vector candidate mapping, dimension validation, and offline tests.
Added query embedding boundary and optional vector repository wiring for hybrid evidence with graceful degradation and offline tests.
Added HTTP query embedding provider, configuration-safe factory, transport injection, stable error mapping, and offline tests.
Added runtime evidence dependency factory and wired server evidence, agent, answer, and chat routes through dependency-aware retrieval with safe fallback.
Added sanitized runtime vector status model, dependency context, health exposure, and offline no-secret-leakage tests.
Added a CLI-ready vector indexing orchestrator, direct CLI entry point, safe reporting, and offline success/failure tests.
Added manifest record model, in-memory manifest store, deterministic reindex decisions, explicit backfill orchestration, and offline tests.
Added JSON file-backed manifest store with missing-file behavior, deterministic ordering, validation, atomic-ish writes, and offline tests.
Added static RAG Glass Wall CTO/operator view, homepage neon entry point, safety/visual tests, and transparent retrieval visualization without exposing secrets or hidden model reasoning.
Added operator-facing corpus backfill CLI with persistent manifest support, dry-run decisions, safe output formatting, and offline tests.
Added offline retrieval eval harness with expected evidence matching, not_found checks, stable metrics, report formatting, synthetic cases, and tests.

Refreshed the static RAG homepage and Glass Wall with premium cinematic visual language, scroll storytelling, technical-room coherence, preserved widget behavior, and static frontend regression tests.
Localized the public frontend to Spanish, added Antigua-inspired institutional visual identity, replaced circular graph nodes with premium panel nodes, and preserved RAG/widget/Glass Wall behavior.

Stabilized the public frontend across laptop, tablet, and mobile viewports with bounded hero cards, cinematic app rail, civic palace hero visual, orbital motion, sticky-nav offsets, widget safe area, and responsive regression tests.
Refined the embeddable chat widget into a premium municipal evidence panel while preserving /api/chat behavior, citation expansion, search modes, widget configuration, and reduced-motion support.

Compose chat answers as synthesis-first municipal responses with visible evidence, raw retrieval-dump suppression, theme extraction, and guided follow-up chips while preserving the existing /api/chat contract.
Enhance the Glass Wall with safe vector runtime explanations, richer embedding/vector-store node copy, vector insight panel, and CSS-only motion while preserving approved endpoint boundaries.

Polish the widget for municipal demos with institutional answer sections, evidence-status labels, cleaned excerpts, source metadata, relevance reasons, traceability seal, and demo-ready prompts while preserving chat behavior.
